title: Write A2A-001 phase plan
objective: Create a detailed source-and-schema foundation plan for the negotiation protocol area.
acceptance: package export posture decided or blocked
stop_conditions: requires broad root exports before tests

title: Specify negotiation schema contracts
objective: Define field-level contracts for NegotiationSession, NegotiationOffer, NegotiationDecision, LinkedAgreement, AgreementObligationBinding, and AgreementStatusTransition.

title: Specify transition and event tests
objective: Plan tests for negotiation transitions and contract stream events.
acceptance: acceptance creates no authority test included
duplicate and stale decision tests included

title: Specify obligation binding and policy hook
objective: Plan exact validation between accepted obligations, AgreementObligationBinding, and ActionContract clearingEvidenceRefs.
stop_conditions: policy can greenlight without agreement state check

title: Specify x402 buyer-seller fixture
objective: Plan the first buyer-agent/seller-agent x402_payment.exact fixture and generated outputs.
acceptance: changed params and replay cases included
stop_conditions: raw sibling payment path used as success

title: Specify readback and support packet
objective: Plan redacted projections that reconstruct agreement to terminal protected-action outcome.
stop_conditions: readback merges gateway and downstream finality
support packet implies permission or recovery
